name: Mordovia Energy Retail Company Public Joint-Stock Company
summary: Mordovia Energy Retail Company Public Joint-Stock Company, an energy company, purchases and sells electricity in the wholesale and retail markets in Russia. It provides various services, including consulting and other, AMR, and installation of electricity meters related to the implementation of the electricity to businesses and individuals, as well as services for the commercialization of electric power. The company supplies electricity to 6,190 businesses and 214,521 individuals. Mordovia Energy Retail Company Public Joint-Stock Company was founded in 1964 and is based in Saransk, Russia.
